_note: Frozen baseline for eval/golden.demo.jsonl: repo self-indexed, pure hybrid (RAG_RERANK_AUTO=off), RAG_CHUNK_CONTEXT_PREFIX=on (default). 23 cases (12 identifier + 11 paraphrase). chunkers.py docstring enriched with plain-English vocabulary ('passages', 'fragments', 'declaration boundaries', 'line counts'); both persistent chunkers.py paraphrase misses resolved to rank 1. Hit@5=1.0 across all intent classes. Re-freeze when any metric moves beyond ±5pp from these values.
